## Change type

- [ ] Normative — adds, removes, or changes a MUST, SHOULD, or MAY requirement
- [ ] Editorial — clarification, typo fix, or rewording with no normative effect
- [ ] New section or content type
- [ ] Reference implementation

## Sections affected

List the sections, tables, or schemas this PR modifies.

## Description

What does this change and why?

## Checklist

- [ ] CHANGELOG.md updated under `[Unreleased]`
- [ ] Version number updated in the spec header if this is a release commit
- [ ] For normative changes: backwards compatible with existing implementations? (If no, explain below.)
- [ ] For new requirements: enforcement mechanism exists or is described
